Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Welcome, Commander! In this tutorial we will learn fleet management by commanding a small NATO task force. You are in command of FGS Lütjens and HNoMS Narvik, two surface escort ships, and the US Sealift Tanker USNS Sealift Indian Ocean.
You can advance the tutorial at any time using the 'Back' and 'Next' buttons on this window.
You can recall this window at any time by opening the Event Log (at bottom right) and clicking on 'Open Free Content Window'.
